Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 270 

PRE_ICL_MONPP_COINS_3M 

LABEL: Pre-ICL Coinsurance Split Network Standard Mail Order — Three-Month Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a three-month supply of the drugs 
on this tier, using mail order non-preferred pharmacy (MONPP; also known as a standard mail order 
pharmacy within a split network) during the
